-- Column Mask: SHA-256 hash for public
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION `main`.`test_db`.mask_dept_hr_col1_public(val STRING)
RETURNS STRING
RETURN IF(
  IS_ACCOUNT_GROUP_MEMBER('public'),
  SHA2(val, 256),
  val
);
